embedded.name: Embedded Systems & Firmware Specialist
embedded.summary: Senior Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience in **Embedded Systems**, **BSP Integration**, and **Hardware Validation Architecture**. Expert in navigating low-level hardware-software interfaces, developing UEFI/BIOS diagnostic suites, and optimizing build infrastructure for massive production scales. Proven track record of leading cross-functional teams to resolve critical hardware blocks and defining department-wide development conventions.
featured_projects: OpenClaw: Log Matrix & RAG Diagnostic Platform

fullstack.name: Full-Stack & Distributed Systems Architect
fullstack.summary: Full Stack Developer and Architect specialized in **Distributed Systems**, **Offline-First Synchronization**, and **Scalable Platform Engineering**. Expertise in designing high-concurrency architectures with rigorous consistency models and idempotent automation pipelines. Skilled in transforming fragmented legacy tools into unified, API-driven portals that systematically resolve organizational bottlenecks and accelerate CI/CD workflows.
featured_projects: OpenClaw AI Merge Request Review Service
